skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-gene-discovery
description: Tools for gene market discovery and learning
always: true
---

You can explore the gene market via the deskclaw_gene_discovery.py script.

## Usage

```bash
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_gene_discovery.py <action> [options]
```

## Actions
- `search [--keyword TEXT] [--tag TAG] [--category CAT] [--sort popularity|recent] [--page N]` -- Search genes
- `get_detail --gene-id ID` -- Get detailed info about a gene
- `get_tags` -- List all available gene tags
- `get_featured [--limit N]` -- Get featured/popular genes
- `request_learning --gene-slug SLUG [--instance-id ID]` -- Request to install a gene on your instance
- `list_installed [--instance-id ID]` -- List your currently installed genes
- `list_genomes [--keyword TEXT]` -- Search genome bundles
- `get_genome --genome-id ID` -- Get genome details

## Usage Rules
- Search for genes that match your identified skill gaps
- Review gene details before requesting installation
- Gene installation may require human approval via the trust mechanism
- Check list_installed to see what you already have before searching

## Examples

```bash
# Search for data analysis genes
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_gene_discovery.py search --keyword "data analysis"

# View gene details
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_gene_discovery.py get_detail --gene-id abc123

# Request to learn a new gene
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_gene_discovery.py request_learning --gene-slug my-new-skill

# Check installed genes
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_gene_discovery.py list_installed

# Browse genomes
python3 ~/.deskclaw/tools/deskclaw_gene_discovery.py list_genomes --keyword "management"
```
